translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can Upgrade or downgrade your cloud Plan at any time. For Offline licenses, you can Upgrade by paying the difference.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open Quelle core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which Plan you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The Kostenlos Plan has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the Weiter month or Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The Kostenlos Plan requires no credit card, no Konto and no commitment. Just Herunterladen and Starten automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and Offline use. Cloud plans Hinzufügen Team Funktionen like shared Workflows and collaboration.

translations.landing.pricing.why.feature1Desc: Herunterladen and Starten using immediately. No sign-up, no credit card, no E-Mail verification needed.
translations.landing.pricing.why.feature2Desc: Everything runs on your computer. Your Workflows data, and results never leave your machine.
translations.landing.pricing.why.feature3Desc: The Kostenlos Plan never expires. Use it as long as you want. Upgrade only when you need more.
